divorceeOnboarding.headerSubtitleDivorce: Ready to meet someone who gets you.
divorceeOnboarding.step1DivorceeMessage: You're ready to find genuine connection. That's all that matters here.
divorceeOnboarding.step1WidowMessage: You're opening your heart again — that takes courage. Smart Shaadi celebrates that.
divorceeOnboarding.step2Message: Your marital history is private. Matches see it only if you both are interested — never by default.
divorceeOnboarding.step3Message: Join members who understand and respect your journey. Real conversations start here.
divorceeOnboarding.trustNote: Your privacy is sacred. You control who sees what.
divorceeOnboarding.completionSuccess: Welcome! Explore at your own pace.
divorceeOnboarding.completionError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
